summary: Exceptional audience recording captures a high‑energy 1984 show with standout Sugaree, Playing in the Band, Space and The Wheel.
review: The tape delivers surprisingly crisp crowd‑sourced sound that lets listeners hear Jerry’s gusto on Playing in the Band, Bobby’s whammy‑bar fireworks and a soaring Bird Song.  Highlights include a superb Sugaree, a fire‑filled Playing > Space > The Wheel sequence, while the second set drifts a bit with Scarlet Fire.

ai_rating.rationale: Most reviewers praise both the musical performance and the audio quality; only minor complaints about track labeling and a meandering second‑set song keep the rating just below “exceptional”.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Exceptional clarity for an audience tape – crisp, well‑balanced and free of noticeable dropouts.  No major mix issues reported.

show_quality.setlist_flow: First set is strong and tightly executed; second set has a few meandering moments (notably Scarlet Fire) but overall maintains the tour’s high‑energy momentum.

band_member_comments.Jerry: Described as ‘going for the gusto’ on Playing, cooking throughout, and being nicely led by Bobby’s rhythm.
band_member_comments.Bob: Praised for his new whammy bar work all tour, delivering crazy, awesome rhythm that drives the jams.
